description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, open-plan design, surrounded by a low boundary wall and landscaped greenery. The structure includes multiple rooms, visible through large windows and sliding glass doors, and is complemented by a driveway with parked vehicles and a sidewalk. The roof is flat, with some areas featuring overhangs or pergola-style shading, and the exterior is finished in a combination of white and neutral tones. The property is bordered by a black fence and includes a small garden with palm trees and shrubs. The main entrance faces the street, with a clear pathway leading to the front door. The overall design emphasizes accessibility, natural light, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped garden, and driveway, enclosed by a low fence. The design features open-plan living and strong indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, sidewalk, and street-facing facade with large windows and landscaping.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard garden, rear windows, and the boundary wall with less visible street elements.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the bungalow, side garden, and the arrangement of rooms and windows along the boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, garage area, and additional landscaping with palm trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
